mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) indicates robust supply-side growth, which boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If INDPRO increases but 20-day forward returns are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 240 (CPIAUCSL) signals central bank intervention, leading to higher interest rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If CPIAUCSL exceeds 240 but 5-day forward returns are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and rises in CPIAUCSL signal accommodative policy amid inflation, creating mixed monetary conditions that depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If FEDFUNDS declines and CPIAUCSL rises but 20-day returns are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monetary tightening cycle, indicated by rising FEDFUNDS, compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If FEDFUNDS rises but 60-day forward returns are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) signals a tight labor market, increasing consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If PAYEMS increases but 5-day forward returns are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 4.0% indicates labor market overheating, prompting inflationary pressures and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If UNRATE falls below 4.0% but 20-day forward returns are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in residential construction (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) signals strong demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If HOUST and RSAFS both rise but 60-day returns are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) during a supply shock depresses corporate profits, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If INDPRO declines but 20-day forward returns are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).
